results.name: basic with text
results.description: Basic land prints with visible rules text, as opposed to the modern style with just a symbol in the rules box.

results.name: ba sing se
results.description: The Earth Kingdom capital, where there is no war and the walls couldn't possibly be breached.

results.name: battalion
results.description: A keyword ability in which an effect triggers when a specific creature attacks with at least two other creatures.

results.name: battle cry
results.description: A keyword ability that triggers that whenever a specific creature attacks, each other attacking creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn.

results.name: bear (body type)
results.description: In male gay culture, a bear is often a larger or obese hairier man who projects an image of rugged masculinity.

results.name: bear buttock
results.description: We never should have made April an administrator. What were we thinking?

results.name: bear with set's mechanic
results.description: A 2/2 for 2 with one of the set's iconic mechanics

results.name: beeble
results.description: A tiny, pink, furry, mischievous species. Originally appearing in Dominaria during Urza's Block, their perceived silliness has caused them to disappear in  Black Border, later showing up near exclusively in Un-/Acorn sets.

results.name: behold
results.description: Cards that have an effect if you control something or reveal from your hand a card with a specific attribute.

results.name: beholder
results.description: An iconic creature from Dungeons & Dragons. For living eye creatures that exist in the worlds of Magic: The Gathering, see [eye (creature)](eye-creature).
